title: Feature request - stop edits once an item has a particular status or is in a particular group
excerpt: Currently there isn’t an easy way to lock and item from additional edits once it is in a particular stage or group.  It would be great if we could limit any future changes once an item is ‘Approved’ exclusively to board …

posts.author: BruceGosk (Bruce Gosk)
posts.cookedHtml: Currently there isn’t an easy way to lock and item from additional edits once it is in a particular stage or group. It would be great if we could limit any future changes once an item is ‘Approved’ exclusively to board owners.

posts.author: meti_integration (Jo)
posts.cookedHtml:
we are also looking for a way to do this

in our use case we no longer want users to be able to edit subitem once at the completed status too
